title: ArchitectureSnapshot
description: DontPanic-local v0 schema (plan 2026-05-19-004 F001). Promote-later note: lives under claude/shared/schemas/v1.0 so future subtree-pull into agent-conventions is one rename away. Captures a stable, fingerprinted view of the DontPanic codebase + plan inventory consumed by drift detection (F003), HTML rendering (F002), supervisor regen (F004), and Plan 4.5's dontpanic new context gatherer (graceful fallback when missing/stale).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. The only timestamp that floats with regen; reused when fingerprint is unchanged to preserve byte-identical output.

file_hashes_root.description: sha256 over sorted `<rel_path>:<sha256-of-content>\n` pairs across tracked source roots.

file_hashes.description: Per-file sha256 map keyed by repo-relative path. Enables exact added/removed/modified diffs without re-walking the prior tree. Restricted under docs/plans/ to plan.md + features.json so audit/evidence artifacts don't cause false drift.

truncated.description: True when the structured sections were clipped to keep the artifact under the size cap (~200KB). When true, truncation_marker explains where.

truncation_marker.description: Human-readable note describing which sections were truncated and the cap that was hit.
